message:
feat: add KubeStellar Console to Infrastructure section (#7)

* feat: add KubeStellar Console to Infrastructure section

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: move KubeStellar Console to Infrastructure optimization with emoji format

Per maintainer feedback: placed under Infrastructure optimization as a
sub-item with proper emoji tags (open source, free, product, browser UI).

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
